title: Gymnosphaera hewittii
intro: There is not enough information available about the plant Gymnosphaera hewittii.
taxonomy: Gymnosphaera hewittii is classified as a species within the family Gymnosphaeraceae, which is a group of plants commonly known as scale fungi. More specifically, it belongs to the genus Gymnosphaera, which is characterized by its unique fruiting bodies. This species is further grouped into the phylum Ascomycota, which includes a wide range of fungi with ascospores. The classification of Gymnosphaera hewittii places it within the kingdom Fungi, indicating its eukaryotic nature and unique characteristics. Further research is necessary to confirm the exact classification and relationships within the Gymnosphaera hewittii species.
